aboutMe>title: Hi! My name is Lenon, I'm a
aboutMe>description: From a very early age, I have always had an affinity for the field of technology. At the age of 16 I took my first steps in studying programming, starting with web development with HTML and CSS. I'm a graduate student in Systems Analysis and Development at the University of Vale do Rio dos Sinos (UNISINOS).
experience>firstJobDescription: Worken in 3 main projects: Tropix - An artwork marketplace, being registered in a nft and negotiated with crypto currency. Eventix - A plataform to buy and resell tickets for events through NFT's. UI SDK - A frontend lib with all the required components to the integration of the pages with the company business rules and products. In all projects the main stack used was ReactJS, Typescript, NextJS, TailwindCSS, SWR, Yup, React Hook Forms, Styles-Components
experience>secondJobDescription:
Worked in several projects, the main projects are:
-An website to buy and sell vehicles which is possible to search, filter, simulate financing and see information about the vehicle and the store. (Typescript, React, NextJS, Chakra UI, React Hook Form, Yup)
-Aplication to help people to find and hire mentors. (React, Typescript, Tailwind CSS, React Query)
-Plataform to manage payment of deliveryman's of a specific delivery app. (Apollo, NestJS, PrismaORM, GraphQL, Typescript)
-Crop management system for production control (React, Typescript, Chakra UI, React Query, React Hook Form)
-Installment payment system accounts via bank slips (React, React-Hook-Form, React-query, Yup and Styled-components)
footer: Developed with React + NextJS + TailwindCSS by me.
